text:
No man pages for 8.2-RELEASE are found:

http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=intro&apropos=0&sektion=0&manpath=FreeBSD+8.2-RELEASE&format=html

Older versions work as expected, for example:

http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=intro&apropos=0&sektion=0&manpath=FreeBSD+8.1-RELEASE&format=html
